subcodes.first_line: O friends of Bahá and companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Like unto the life-giving breath of unity, harmony, fellowship and love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان بهاء و یاران عبدالبهاء چون نفحه جانبخش اتحاد و اتفاق و الفت و محبت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment
